executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Run a focused non-destructive demo-user suite. Frontend is http://localhost:5175 and backend is http://localhost:8000. For user dashboard and QR access tests TC011 and TC015, log in with authorized volunteer demo.voluntario@test.local / DemoPassword123!. For admin tests TC019 and TC022, log in with admin@test.local / AdminTestPassword123!. For TC019 search specifically search for demo.personal@test.local and/or demo.voluntario@test.local and verify role/status rows are visible. Do not authorize, reject, unauthorize, or reauthorize users in this run. Do not use camera; if QR scan page is reached, only verify manual mode controls are visible.
